name: Velocity (Planned vs Completed Story Points)
description: Last 10 sprints planned versus completed story points
query: WITH sprint_velocity AS (SELECT COALESCE(entity_id, full_date::text) AS sprint_key, MAX(full_date) AS sprint_date, SUM(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'velocity_planned_sp' THEN value ELSE 0 END) AS planned_story_points, SUM(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'velocity_completed_sp' THEN value ELSE 0 END) AS completed_story_points FROM metrics.v_facts WHERE calc_code IN ('velocity_planned_sp', 'velocity_completed_sp') AND slice_rule_name IS NULL [[ AND project_key = {{project_key}} ]] [[ AND full_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND full_date <= {{date_to}} ]] GROUP BY COALESCE(entity_id, full_date::text)) SELECT sprint_key AS sprint_name, planned_story_points, completed_story_points FROM sprint_velocity ORDER BY sprint_date DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10
